channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Canner /WrenAI | Python | N/A
item.description: GenBI (Generative BI) for AI agents, an open-source, governed text-to-SQL through an open context layer that turns natural-language questions into trusted dashboards, charts, and SQL across 20+ data sources, such as BigQuery, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Amazon Redshift, Databricks and more.

item.title: codecrafters-io /build-your-own-x | Markdown | N/A
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: MoonshotAI /kimi-cli | Python | N/A
item.description: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

item.title: trycua /cua | HTML | N/A
item.description: Scale computer-use 2.0 with open-source drivers, cross-OS fleets, and benchmarks for training, evaluation, and data generation.

item.title: AstrBotDevs /AstrBot | Python | N/A
item.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

item.title: microsoft /terminal | C++ | N/A
item.description: The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!

item.title: PostHog /posthog | Python | N/A
item.description: 🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

item.title: github /copilot-sdk | Java | N/A
item.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: andrewrabert /jellium-desktop | Rust | N/A
item.description: An unofficial desktop client for Jellyfin

item.title: KnockOutEZ /wigolo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: jamiepine /voicebox | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: rohitg00 /ai-engineering-from-scratch | Python | N/A
item.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: kvcache-ai /ktransformers | Python | N/A
item.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

item.title: tirth8205 /code-review-graph | Python | N/A
item.description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

item.title: bojieli /ai-agent-book | Python | N/A
item.description: 《深入理解 AI Agent：设计原理与工程实践》（李博杰 著）开源主仓库：全书正文、编译版 PDF 与按章配套代码
